content: * <1>OpenRouter pricing</1> + 20% service fee applies at usage

comment.text: This key provides a note explaining that OpenRouter pricing plus a 20% service fee applies to AI usage. It appears as a muted text link within the PricingBillingBody panel of the AI service settings page, likely clarifying billing details for users. Translators should ensure the translated text accurately conveys the fee structure.
